'''Exclusion''' is often as or more important than inclusion.

<blockquote>
''You need some means of excluding chaos for your system to function.... Right now, the most important thing is to exclude people who can't think properly from conversations of critical importance, because everyone else can't carry that person in their attempt to reason morally about a technical issue.''

-'''Eric Weinstein''' on [https://youtu.be/C84cpRGGC5U?t=1498 The Jolly Swagman #100 @ 25 min]
</blockquote>

{{#widget:YouTube|id=C84cpRGGC5U|start=1499}}

== Related Concepts ==

* [[Portal:Interoperability and Exclusion|Interoperability and Exclusion]]
* [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lipid_bilayer Lipid Bilayer]
* [[Portal:Audience Capture|Audience Capture]]
* [[Portal:Extractive Elite|Extractive Elite]]

{{Stub}}

[[Category:Culture]]
[[Category:Concepts]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
